title: Wood — Dawn breath alignment
steps: Face east at first light for nine measured breaths.
Hold intention on growth without forcing outcomes.
Write one sentence of what you will nurture today.

title: Fire — Single-flame focus
steps: Light one candle at the hour of action.
Name the one task that must not be divided.
Extinguish with gratitude — do not blow in frustration.

title: Water — Moon cup offering
steps: Fill a cup with still water before sleep.
Whisper what you are willing to release.
Pour out at dawn; do not drink this cup.

title: Metal — Boundary ring
steps: Trace a circle on paper with a metal pen.
Inside: what is yours to protect. Outside: what is not.
Carry the paper folded until the hour passes.

title: Earth — Stone anchor
steps: Hold a stone in the left hand for the length of one song.
Breathe into the belly; let the shoulders drop.
Place the stone where you work — it marks stable ground.

title: Jupiter — Thursday lamp
steps: On Thursday, light a yellow or gold lamp for twenty-seven minutes.
Offer thanks for one teaching received.
Give something small away without expectation.

title: Saturn — Discipline hour
steps: Choose one uncomfortable task; begin at the top of the hour.
Work in silence for twenty-five minutes.
Stop on time — Saturn rewards boundaries, not exhaustion.
